seo.title: Avalon Voice Narrator | Auto Host Script for The Resistance: Avalon
seo.description: Avalon Voice automatically reads the host script and narration out loud so no one has to memorize the lines. Pick your player count and roles, then start an online Avalon game instantly.
seo.ogTitle: Avalon Voice Narrator - Auto Host Script & Narration for Avalon
seo.ogDescription: Set your player count and roles, and Avalon Voice narrates the host script and narration for you from start to finish.

home.title: Avalon Voice Narrator
home.description: Automatically narrates the host script and narration for The Resistance: Avalon. Choose a player count, review the suggested roles, and adjust the setup before starting.
home.mismatch: Your role selection does not match the recommended count.

game.title: Game guide
game.description: Follow the spoken setup instructions and pass the device when needed.
game.unsupported: Speech synthesis is unavailable in this browser.

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Avalon is a hidden-role deduction game where good tries to complete quests and evil tries to stop them.

script: Merlin, open your eyes. Evil players except Mordred, show a thumbs up.
Evil players except Oberon, open your eyes and identify one another.
Percival, open your eyes. Merlin and Morgana, show a thumbs up.
